claims.summary: Mode-packing score is a strong companion and possible leading indicator for pressure risk in recent live observations.
The available 817-row window showed pressure risk 0.19-0.23, mode packing 0.25-0.34, correlation 0.9581, and no local-control applications.
A density-gradient porosity buffer or automatic local-control relief would change live regulation and requires scoped approval, replay, canary, abort, and post-change being response.
